title: Oscars Predictions via Feinberg Forecast: Scott's Final Picks - Hollywood Reporter
text: According to Scott Feinberg's Feinberg Forecast for the 98th Academy Awards, the cinematography category projections are: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) — Michael Bauman, Sinners (Warner Bros.) — Autumn Durald Arkapaw, Train Dreams (Netflix) — Adolpho Veloso, Frankenstein (Netflix) — Dan Laustsen, Marty Supreme (A24) — Darius Khondji. Feinberg bases his forecasts on screening films, analyzing campaigns, consulting with voters, and studying relevant historical data and statistics rather than personal preferences.
